routing.question: Kan het gebruik van valse documenten door Rami een objectief criterium zijn voor risico op onderduiken in de zin van artikel 1, paragraaf 2, punt 2?

deduction.label: unknown
deduction.extraction_repair_hint: The selected legal conclusion could not be proven because an observable antecedent required by the KB rule was not asserted from the case. Re-check the case text for facts matching these observable schema symbols: subject_to_international_protection_procedure: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.; subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for processing an international protection request.; individual_examination_performed: An individual examination of the person has been performed to assess the risk of absconding..
